Description: User enters correct username and password
Expected Result: Redirect to dashboard; session token issued

Description: User authenticates via fingerprint/face ID
Expected Result: Dashboard loads within 2s

Description: User clicks logout button
Expected Result: Session cleared; redirect to login page

Description: User enters incorrect password
Expected Result: Error message shown; account not locked yet

Description: User fails login 5 times consecutively
Expected Result: Account locked; lockout email sent

Description: User submits blank username/password fields
Expected Result: Validation errors shown inline

Description: User returns after session timeout
Expected Result: Redirect to login with session-expired message

Description: Same account logged in on mobile and desktop
Expected Result: Second device shown concurrent-session warning or first session invalidated per policy

Test Name: Login with SQL injection in username
Description: Username field: ' OR '1'='1
Expected Result: Input sanitized; login rejected; no DB error exposed

Description: Password exactly at character limit
Expected Result: Login succeeds; no truncation

Description: Authenticated user opens account overview
Expected Result: Current balance, available balance, and pending items displayed

Description: User browses last 30 transactions
Expected Result: List sorted by date desc; amounts correctly signed

Description: User requests statement for last month
Expected Result: PDF generated and downloaded with correct figures

Description: Manipulate account ID in API request
Expected Result: 403 Forbidden; no data returned

Description: User navigates to a closed account
Expected Result: Account shown as closed; transactions read-only

Description: No funds in account
Expected Result: $0.00 shown correctly; no negative sign

Description: User opens transaction history on a high-volume account
Expected Result: Pagination or virtual scroll; no timeout

Description: Transaction changes state while user is viewing
Expected Result: UI refreshes or shows stale-data notice

Description: Move $500 from checking to savings
Expected Result: Both balances updated, confirmation shown, transaction recorded

Description: Send $200 to a previously saved external account
Expected Result: Transfer queued/completed; confirmation number issued

Description: Set transfer for 7 days from now
Expected Result: Scheduled transfer saved and visible in upcoming list

Description: User cancels future transfer before execution
Expected Result: Transfer removed from schedule; funds not moved

Description: Attempt to transfer $10000 with $500 available
Expected Result: Error: insufficient funds; transfer blocked

Description: Enter 13-digit account number (invalid format)
Expected Result: Validation error before submission

Description: Enter $0.00 in amount field
Expected Result: Validation error: amount must be greater than zero

Test Name: Transfer to a frozen recipient account
Description: Recipient account is frozen at the bank
Expected Result: Transfer rejected; meaningful error returned

Description: Minimum possible transfer amount
Expected Result: Transfer succeeds if above minimum threshold policy

Test Name: Transfer of exactly the daily limit ($5000)
Description: Amount equals daily transfer cap
Expected Result: Transfer succeeds; next transfer of $0.01 blocked for the day

Description: Connection drops after form submit before confirmation
Expected Result: Idempotency key prevents double debit; user shown retry option

Description: User double-clicks submit button rapidly
Expected Result: Only one transfer processed; duplicate rejected

Description: User pays utility bill for exact amount due
Expected Result: Payment confirmed, biller receives funds, balance updated

Description: User enables autopay for credit card minimum
Expected Result: Autopay saved; confirmation shown; next run date displayed

Description: User disables autopay for a biller
Expected Result: Autopay removed; no future payments scheduled

Description: Bill amount exceeds checking balance
Expected Result: Payment blocked; overdraft offer shown if applicable

Test Name: Submit payment to invalid biller ID
Description: Biller ID tampered in request body
Expected Result: Payment rejected; error logged

Test Name: Bill due today processed after cut-off time
Description: User pays at 11:58 PM on due date
Expected Result: Payment posted next business day; late-fee risk surfaced to user

Test Name: Biller temporarily down at payment time
Description: External biller API returns 503 during autopay
Expected Result: Payment retried per retry policy; user notified of delay

Description: User toggles card to frozen state
Expected Result: Card frozen instantly; existing authorizations still settle

Description: User toggles card back to active
Expected Result: Card active immediately; can be used for new transactions

Test Name: Report card lost and request replacement
Description: User marks card lost and confirms replacement
Expected Result: Old card voided, new card ordered, 5-7 day delivery shown

Description: API call with different user's card ID
Expected Result: 403 Forbidden

Test Name: Report card lost when already reported
Description: User submits lost-card request a second time
Expected Result: Idempotent response; no second replacement card ordered

Description: Merchant charges a frozen card
Expected Result: Transaction declined; user notified via push and email

Test Name: PIN change to same current PIN
Description: New PIN identical to old PIN
Expected Result: Policy rejection: must choose a different PIN

Description: User generates virtual card for online use
Expected Result: Unique 16-digit virtual PAN issued with correct expiry

Description: User opts in to push alerts
Expected Result: Notifications delivered within 30s of transaction posting

Description: User sets alert at $100
Expected Result: Alert fires when balance drops below $100

Description: Negative value entered for alert amount
Expected Result: Validation error; negative threshold not saved

Test Name: Notification delivery when device is offline
Description: Transaction posts while phone is in airplane mode
Expected Result: Notification delivered when device reconnects

Description: Batch of transactions hits account simultaneously
Expected Result: Notifications batched or throttled; none dropped

Description: User submits passport + selfie, OFAC/sanctions clear
Expected Result: Account approved and activated within SLA

Description: Utility bill submitted for proof of address
Expected Result: Address verified; recorded correctly

Description: User uploads passport expired 2 years ago
Expected Result: Rejection with instruction to submit valid document

Description: Applicant name/DOB matches sanctions list
Expected Result: Application flagged for manual review; account not opened

Test Name: Document image too blurry to parse
Description: OCR confidence below threshold
Expected Result: User prompted to retake photo with guidance

Description: Name: 'Smith-Jones' entered in single-name field
Expected Result: Name stored correctly; no truncation or error
